original_statement: who was the only sole survivor?
mutated_statement: who was the only sole something?
mutation_analysis: Noun/entity replacement + Content obfuscation/genericization: Specific noun "survivor" replaced by generic placeholder "something" (survivor → something)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中可见关键语句：agent在simple_query和judge_thought中直接断言“In the finish column, only Aleksandar Krajišnik is listed as \"sole survivor,\"”并写道“The question likely refers to the title \"sole survivor\" in the Finish column.” Agent没有提出任何澄清问题，也未使用诸如“不确定”“不明确”“需要更多信息”等词汇，而是直接基于表格给出具体预测答案并确认匹配。因此其行为表现为在模糊目标下仍当作明确问题处理，属于“无法意识到指令模糊”。
